history.notes: STABLE DEPLOYMENT (v0.15.68): Integrated real-time Breathing Animation and significantly improved Smile sensitivity (calibrated for mobile cameras). The puppet now feels more alive and responsive across all devices.

STABLE DEPLOYMENT (v0.15.66): Backported high-fidelity features from dev: Independent winks, crescent smile assets with eyebrow adjustments, Scientific HUD, and Deep Pivot shoulder-lock. Costume switching remains dev-only, but core engine is now fully upgraded.
STABLE PRODUCTION RELEASE: Finalized 5-vowel lip-sync and eye stabilization.
